title: Vorknkx Project
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the Vorknkx Project|the [[Phantom Project]], another [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] project}}
[[File:ThrawnTIE3.jpg|thumb|[[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] is briefed on the Project.]]
The '''Vorknkx Project''' was a project carried out by the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] to create low-power [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking devices]] for [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] . Results of the project were stored at [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]], and were collected by [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].

==History==
The ultimate goal was to use this technology to cloak [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. The testbed for the project was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian corvette]] called the ''[[Vorknkx]]'', hence the project's name. The project was so secret that only [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], head of new technology [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]], and the project's staff knew anything of its existence.

After Zaarin's coup on the Emperor failed, he set his sights on damaging Imperial manufacturing capabilities and gaining technological advantages. Shortly after a failed attempt to capture prototype [[Missile Boat]]s, Zaarin took his forces into hiding. He later reemerged and sent a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate|modified frigate]], ''[[Z-Borus]]'', to capture the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] laboratory of the Vorknkx Project. Grand Admiral [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], who had been tasked by the Emperor to capture or kill Zaarin, sent his best [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], in a Missile Boat to defend the base; the modified frigate ''Z-Borus'' was destroyed, and the project was relocated to an abandoned [[Mining/Legends|mine]] on an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] called [[To-phalion Base]].

However, Zaarin had planted [[Spy/Legends|spies]] in the facility, and they succeeded in stealing the corvette ''Vorknkx''. What Zaarin didn't know was that Thrawn had anticipated this move and planted a [[Homing beacon/Legends|tracking device]] on the [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. Thrawn's task force followed and trapped Zaarin at the very edge of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], where he planned to regroup his forces. Zaarin was forced to abandon his [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], [[Glory (Imperial-class)|''Glory'']], during the fight, and he and some of his officers fled on the ''Vorknkx''. To mask their escape while entering [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], they activated its [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]]. Unknown to them, the Vorknkx Project scientists had earlier discovered that the device would overload, and probably explode, if used in conjunction with hyperspace [[Engine/Legends|engines]]. Their ignorance of this was due to Thrawn having had this information erased from the project logs. As a result, Zaarin and all on board the ''Vorknkx'' [[Death/Legends|perished]] in an explosion.

The Vorknkx Project was cut afterward, as its testbed and only working prototype was destroyed, and the subsequent death of the Emperor prohibited any revival of the project. To Thrawn the project served only one purpose, the destruction of Zaarin.
